# Folder README Template

## Purpose

Use this template for README files inside folders such as `docs/`, `repositories/`, `contracts/`, `diagrams/`, and `specs`.

## Required Structure

- Folder title.
- Purpose.
- What belongs here.
- What does not belong here.
- Index.
- Reading route, if useful.
- Related documents.
- Maintenance rules.

## Template Body

```md
# <Folder Name>

## Purpose

Describe what this folder is for.

## What Belongs Here

- <Document or artifact type>

## What Does Not Belong Here

- <Out-of-scope content and where it should go>

## Index

| Path | Purpose |
| --- | --- |
| [<File or folder>](<relative-link>) | <Short purpose> |

## Reading Route

1. [<Document title>](<relative-link>)

## Related Documents

- [<Document title>](<relative-link>)

## Maintenance Rules

- Keep this README as an index.
- Add short links, not duplicated content.
```
